name: floating-navbar
title: Floating Navbar
description: A reusable floating navigation bar with preserved motion behavior, array-driven links, and flexible brand configuration for logo or text.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of link objects used to render desktop and mobile navigation

props.name: brand
props.description: Brand configuration supporting logo, text, or custom brand content

props.name: callToAction
props.description: Optional desktop CTA button and matching mobile CTA link

props.name: leadingSlot
props.description: Optional node rendered before the CTA area

props.name: trailingSlot
props.description: Optional node rendered after the CTA area

subComponents.name: FloatingNavbarBrandLogo
subComponents.description: Renders brand logo with optional dark mode source

subComponents.name: FloatingNavbarBrandText
subComponents.description: Renders brand text when no logo is used

props.name: children
props.description: Brand copy rendered in the navbar
